# Sneha Salam

Sneha Salam is an operations-minded professional focused on clear communication, structure, and efficient execution.

## Profile

- Human resources and business process specialist
- Business operations and communications professional
- Client communication and stakeholder coordination focused
- People-centered leader with a practical, organized working style

## What Sneha Does

- Manages operations, strategic planning, and team coordination
- Builds structured documentation and workflow systems
- Supports HR, finance, admin, and cross-functional work
- Handles client communication, public relations, and stakeholder management
- Helps organizations improve clarity, accountability, and execution

## Core Strengths

- Operational coordination
- Executive communication
- Stakeholder management
- Structured documentation
- Workflow systems
- Cross-functional execution

## Experience Themes

- Founder and CEO work centered on operations, delivery, brand presence, website management, and client onboarding
- Corporate operations leadership across HR, finance, admin, marketing, and sales support
- Human resources work involving payroll-related documents and team support
- Project management support with documentation, tracking, BRD, SRS, testing, and deployment coordination
- Community and volunteering leadership in communications, events, PR, and team operations

## Education

- BBA at BRAC University
- HSC in Business Studies at Dhaka City College
- SSC in Business Studies at Mohammadpur Preparatory School & College

## Professional Focus

Sneha’s work style is grounded in organization, professional communication, and reliable execution. She is strongest in roles that require structure, coordination, and people-focused leadership.
